generatedFromSchema_doNotEdit.title: Entity Raid Garden Behavior
generatedFromSchema_doNotEdit.description: Allows the mob to eat/raid crops out of farms until they are full.

fields.title: Blocks
fields.description: Blocks that the mob is looking for to eat/raid

fields.title: Eat Delay
fields.description: Time in seconds between each time it eats/raids

fields.title: Full Delay
fields.description: Amount of time in seconds before this mob wants to eat/raid again after eating its maximum

fields.title: Goal Radius
fields.description: Distance in blocks within the mob considers it has reached the goal. This is the "wiggle room" to stop the AI from bouncing back and forth trying to reach a specific spot.

fields.title: Initial Eat Delay
fields.description: Time in seconds before starting to eat/raid once it arrives at it

fields.title: Max To Eat
fields.description: Maximum number of crops this entity wants to eat/raid. If set to zero or less then it doesn't have a maximum

fields.title: Search Height
fields.description: Height in blocks the mob will look for crops to eat

fields.title: Search Range
fields.description: Distance in blocks the mob will look for crops to eat

fields.title: Speed Multiplier
fields.description: Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this goal.
